global.description: The ad features a modern design with a focus on travel services.
global.main_message: Promoting a travel app for booking hotels and flights easily.

elements.label: Purple abstract background
elements.description: A smooth purple gradient background with abstract shapes subtly integrated.

elements.label: RouteBloon
elements.description: Bold, large text at the top of the ad, prominently displaying the brand name 'RouteBloon' in a striking font.

elements.label: Fly smarter message
elements.description: Medium-sized text in white, conveying the message 'Fly smarter Hotels flights in one tap' with a clean and modern font.

elements.label: Get offer button
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom of the ad with the text 'Get offer' in a contrasting color, inviting user interaction.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: A small, light-colored circle positioned near the center, adding a decorative touch to the layout.

elements.label: Medium square
elements.description: A medium-sized square shape in a lighter shade, positioned centrally to enhance the visual interest.

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: The brand logo 'RouteBloon' displayed prominently at the top, designed to capture attention.

elements.label: Service description
elements.description: Text describing the service offered, 'Fly smarter Hotels flights in one tap', presented in a clear and engaging manner.
elements.text_content: Fly smarter Hotels flights in one tap

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A clear and inviting button labeled 'Get offer' at the bottom, encouraging users to take action.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, rewarded_video, minimalist with vibrant colors, RouteBloon, travel services.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, the main message is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
